stemHtml: In aerodrome weather reports, CAVOK indicates that visibility is...

options.a: 10 km+, no significant cloud below 1,500 ft/GND, no significant weather.
options.b: more than 8 km, no significant cloud below 3,000 ft/GND, no significant weather.
options.c: more than 5,000 m, no significant cloud below 1,500 m/GND, no significant weather.
options.d: 10,000 m+, no significant cloud below 5,000 ft/GND or 1,500 m/GND, no significant weather.
